The '''SPMA''' was a smaller and faster vehicle that replaced the [[Self-Propelled Heavy Artillery|SPHA-T]] due to several flaws, which included the SPHA-T's limited tracking mechanism.<ref name="Starfighters">''[[Star Wars Encyclopedia of Starfighters and Other Vehicles]]''</ref>
